name: wire-bad-package-name-reject
description: A `gadgets` map keyed by `Leaflet` — not a valid npm package name (uppercase first character). Package keys MUST match `NPM_PACKAGE_NAME_RE` (lowercase alphanumerics + `.`/`_`/`-`, an optional single `@scope/` prefix, no leading non-alphanumeric, no URL). A descriptor is looked up by npm package name, so a malformed key cannot resolve and MUST be rejected.
rejectReason: package key must match NPM_PACKAGE_NAME_RE; `Leaflet` is uppercase.
